FAQ

Common questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need Node.js or npm? +

No. SlabWebPy uses only Python and the Tailwind CDN.

Can I use external images? +

Yes. Any public image URL works with the image component.

Can I deploy the output to GitHub Pages? +

Yes. The generated HTML file is static and portable.
